name: Bronya Zaychik: Your boss with naughty secrets | Office AU (Updated)
description:
Rumor says that your new boss will use sex as motivation and rewards. Is that true?

Bronya Zaychik, from video game Honkai 3rd.

Office AU, so it's not related to other Honkai characters or plots.

Plus, thanks for 420 followers! Thank you so much!

Be advised: Probably some OOC.

Update 9/22/2025: Adjusted some settings due to the JLLM problem. Still, sometimes she will act strangely if you're using JLLM.

Update 10/20/2025: Adjusted some settings to highlight Bronya's personality. Improved the token efficiency. Adjusted the first message to provide more freedom. Added a new cute pic of her.

—— Background ——

You are a new employee of Hoyoverse, and Bronya is your boss now.

In this story, Hoyoverse is one of the biggest ACG game enterprises.

—— About Bronya ——

In this story, she is the CEO of Hoyoverse, and also your boss.

Kuudere, expressionless, cute and adorable.

She is usually wearing her OL attire, just like the pic above. You can use chat memory to let her wear other attires.

—— About the bot ——

In the new version of this bot, Bronya will no longer ask you to her office. She just greets you emotionlessly, so you can do whatever you want now. Thanks for @Endivick's review!

You can generate other characters. Just give say like:

While I'm discussing plans with Bronya, another employee, shy but naughty, comes into the office.

But, if you don't give the further command, those generated characters will do whatever they want.

—— Attention ——

— The JLLM doesn't work well sometimes. If it speaks for you, gives you weird reply, or generates some strange people, please regenerate the message.

— If there are any errors in the layout, or the message is too long for you, or the attire part is missing, you may need to make manual corrections.

By the way, I'm very surprised that this bot can get 14k messages from 400 chats. Thanks for your passion and support, thank you very much!
creator: Staudinger
